test_sufficiency_summary: Sufficient: the mixed ship-summary regression asserts exact ADF/MR bullets alongside hull and other effects, source-contract tests lock both FTacticalGame conversion seams, and an independent verifier rerun of TacticalTests passed OK (92 tests).
documentation_accuracy_summary: Accurate: DesignNotes.md names both runtime conversion seams and their preserved previousValue/newValue/amount payload, matching FTacticalGame.cpp and enabling exact ADF/MR aggregate bullets.
